notes: Curated aliases are merged with official TFDA ingredient aliases by scripts/build-term-index.mjs. Keep ambiguous trade/common names, but mark them in notes so review UI can ask for confirmation.

aliases.note: Ambiguous abbreviation; can also mean butylated hydroxyanisole.

terms.notes: Common acne/keratolytic ingredient. Abbreviation BHA requires context check.
Preservative alias set. Short aliases MI/MIT are useful but should be confirmed in dense ingredient lists.
Often appears with methylisothiazolinone as an MCI/MI mixture.
Used in some preservative/antimicrobial contexts; claims can affect product classification.
Heavy-metal family matching should surface confirmation prompts for salts and compounds.

Oxidizing ingredient used in hair and oral products; concentration and product type matter.

Grouped because the TFDA rule covers potassium or sodium hydroxide together.
Common in hair-color and pH-adjusting contexts.
Hair dye ingredient; do not merge with substituted resorcinols without CAS evidence.
Hair dye term; sulfate salt should remain linked but identifiable.
Separate from cosmetic retinol and retinyl esters; regulatory risk differs.

Family term for chloride, bromide, and saccharinate variants listed by TFDA.

terms.notes: Concept term for import labeling, food and product origin statements, made-in wording, and customs origin evidence.

terms.notes: Trade document concept for origin evidence. Keep separate from COA, which usually means certificate of analysis.
Operational trade term for allocating freight, insurance, delivery, and import-clearance responsibilities.
Customs document concept for declared value, buyer/seller, shipment description, and trade terms.

terms.notes: Customs and logistics document concept for carton, quantity, weight, and package details.
Operational concept for sale, sample, demo, testing, repair, return, gift, and personal-use shipments.
Umbrella term for importer, local responsible firm, agent, consignee, or category-specific responsible business operator.

aliases.note: Usually certificate of analysis; do not confuse with certificate of origin.

terms.notes: Evidence-document concept for analytical test reports, specifications, safety files, and supplier documentation.

Concept for B2B foods and raw materials in intact packages, especially imported goods that will be repackaged, sub-packaged, or further processed.

terms.notes: Customs workflow for obtaining a binding CCC-code classification ruling before import when product classification is uncertain.

Concept term for cosmetic ingredient naming, INCI lookup, and synonym mapping.
Taiwan cosmetic prohibited-ingredient dataset concept, including CAS-based hard-block screening.
Taiwan cosmetic restricted-ingredient dataset concept for concentration limits, use scope, and label cautions.

Taiwan cosmetic preservative dataset concept, including INCI/CAS aliases, limit text, use scope, and required cautions.
Taiwan sunscreen-ingredient dataset concept for UV filter limits, sunscreen factor evidence, and PIF functional substantiation.
Concept term for mandatory nutrition panels, nutrition claims, and nutrient declaration evidence.
Taiwan food labeling and advertising claims concept for false, exaggerated, misleading, medical-efficacy, nutrition, and sweetness claims.
Concept term for mandatory and advisory allergen declarations on food labels.
Concept term for cosmetic product information file and safety documentation obligations, including Taiwan PIF implementation stages and TFDA PIF management principles.

aliases.note: May refer to filing, registration, or notification depending on jurisdiction.

terms.notes: Concept term for product notification, filing, and registration workflows before or around market entry.
Taiwan cosmetic GMP concept used with the post-2024 unified cosmetics management system and PIF implementation stages.
Taiwan cosmetic labeling and claims concept for required label items, product usage statements, deceptive or exaggerated wording, and medical-efficacy claim screening.
Taiwan food-additive inspection registration concept, especially single food additives under TFDA registration and permit-document management.
Taiwan import-document concept for compound food additives, linking product composition reports, official health certificates, and related certificates.
Umbrella legal concept for Taiwan import/export administration, exporter-importer registration, trade controls, restrictions, and trade-order obligations.
Taiwan operator-registration concept for companies or firms engaging in import/export business, including English-name review and qualification lookup.
Customs-entry concept for import/export declaration forms, invoice, packing list, permits, single-window transmission, and post-clearance evidence.

SHTC import-control evidence concept, covering IC, WA, and DV documents used to verify intended use, customs clearance, and arrival/transfer obligations.
Export-control screening concept for intended use, final user, ultimate consignee, certificates of end use, written assurances, and restricted-area routing.
